captions.text: Six numbers. One week. One story.
Zero. Treasury weekly change. Four weeks of buying. Then full stop.
+16,718. AUD contracts. Largest CFTC build. Ever.

voiceover.text: Six numbers. One week. One story.
Zero. Treasury weekly change. Four weeks of buying, then full stop.

Minus 58 percent. Yen unwind. 42,871 contracts down to 17,904 in five days. Plus 16,718. Australian dollar. Largest single-week CFTC build ever. 35.87 million ounces of silver delivered in four days. COMEX inventory halved. 38.2% lease rate. February's halt was at 35. We're above it. 93. Crypto relay score. Confirmed. But the chart says otherwise.
That's one week. Six numbers. All pointing the same direction.
Like and subscribe. Full breakdown in the link in bio.
